title: World Cup Fantasy: Haaland + Sarr braces, Ryerson injury update
original_text:
World Cup Live. FPL Coming Soon. Lowest Price This Year

The FFScout Podcast is a daily FPL podcast providing you the tips you need to succeed. Featuring FPL Harry, Joe, Neale, Sam, FPL General and more!

Win prizes and try to beat the FFScout community!

Norway booked their place in the knockout stages of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after edging past Senegal in a thrilling 3-2 contest.

Despite a late push from the African nation, Norway held firm to secure all three points and confirm their progression to the Round of 32.

“He trained a little bit now and then. So, we had a conversation with him this morning and then he wanted to try. He had played with such pain before but it just got worse and worse. And then I just decided to take him out, because he was put down twice by a man in the first two attacks. And then there’s nothing to wait for. So it was a calculated gamble that didn’t work.” – Stale Solbakken on Julian Ryerson

Those going for Sarr in MD3 WC should make sure they get the right one.

Has anyone had a player auto sub in at the end of a MD for a player marked DNP despite making manual subs during the MD?

Exact funds Jimenez + Raphinha + Muharemovic > Sarr + V.Junior + Chadi Riad (Morocco) Yes or No? Bounou Rangel Kimmich Cucurella Coufal Munoz Riad* V.Junior* Bruno Olisse Velverde Rodriguez Messi Haaland Sarr*

Transfers are fine but I would worry about Rangel, Kimmich, Olisse, Messi and possibly Haaland and the Colombians(if they win their next game) getting rotated.

Thanks Rangel is covered Messi i have from the start, with the assumption that he'd start all the games Why would Haaland get rotated? Kimmich Olisse and Colombians are a concern, I think Olisse might still start, not sure though Don't want to use WC at this point in time because for the same reason, heavy rotations and early subs Might use MaxC to cover a bit

Think the Norwegian manager hinted at resting key players against France to combat fatigue (whatever that means).

He said this about Haaland which I'm counting on "It's easier to win the Golden Boot when you play for France and Argentina, but we'll try to give Erling more games, and more help also in the next games. So he's on fire and I'm very happy for him that he can score on the biggest stage," he said.

I would still guess Haaland would start but who knows.

Haaland starts but playd 60-70 minutes. Mbappe will surely start. Winner get a 3rd placer from group C/D/F/G/H (Currently Scotland, Paraguay, Sweden, Belgium or Cap Verde). Runner up gets Ecuador, Ivory Coast or even Curacao.

I'm counting on this "It's easier to win the Golden Boot when you play for France and Argentina, but we'll try to give Erling more games, and more help also in the next games. So he's on fire and I'm very happy for him that he can score on the biggest stage," he said.

I don't see how he could pass on the opportunity to face off vs Mbappe in a match in the World Cup stage. You do not get lot of those opportunities.

Those on Wildcard MD3, which 3 forwards have you landed on? Currently have Mbappe, Gakpo and Alvarez. Kane in for Alvarez if Ghana get something tonight

Have the same and will swap out Alvarez for Kane if Ghana do the unexpected. Not sure about Mbappe though, that is a hard game coming up v Norway. Would fancy France but don't think there will be toomany goals in the game. Thinking might be better going with Oylazabal.

You need to be logged in to post a comment.
_note: 全文走 summary 块A(LLM三判后只增不改);processed=成熟仓库累积,raw=本次收集过程。
